full_text:
Wu Zhou (Bonan) 武周 (伯南)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wu Zhou (武周), styledBonan (伯南), was born in Zhu village in Peiguo (modern-day Suzhou in Anhui). An elegant scholar. Had some feuds. Wu Zhou was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
